content.en:
Most of these creatures were comparable to the level of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses, and their strength was limited, if they didn't hide here, they would inevitably die in the tidal period of the Origin Black River.

Ye Tian didn't kill these creatures because there was no need.

However, he made an unexpected discovery.

There was a lot of black mud on the stone wall above the grotto.

"Origin Black Mud!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He didn't expect that there would be so much Origin Black Mud in this grotto.

But soon, he guessed the reason.

The power of the tides has been pounding on this grotto, but this grotto is not simple, and it can withstand the impact of the force of the tides.

And the inside of this grotto extends in all directions, the river water passes through here, the power of the tide is decomposed, and those rivers will also become the river water in the ordinary period of the source of the Heihe, and some of the original black mud carried in the river water will not be able to float up and leave, and will be directly intercepted by the stone wall on the top of the grotto.

That's why there's so much Origin Black Mud here.

Of course.

This is also the special structure of the grotto, which can intercept the original black mud, and if it is other places, there is no way to do it.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian exuded the aura of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and these creatures did not attack.

Although their intelligence is not high, they are not stupid, knowing that Ye Tian is still an existence that they can't compete with, they didn't make a move, but stayed there honestly and didn't move.

Ye Tian entered the grotto and took down these origin black muds.

Soon, all the original black mud in the grotto fell into his hands.

"About a dozen catties of origin black mud!"

Ye Tian was excited, this is a big harvest for nothing!

But.

It's just this harvest, he wants to squat here, then it's probably hopeless.

Now, the entire Origin Black River Origin Black Mud has been brought up, and naturally it will not descend down and rush into the grotto.

So, he left directly and did not wait here.

Time passes slowly.

One primeval epoch after another passed, and the Origin Black Clay became more and more difficult to collect.

This time, there were too many powerhouses who had entered the Origin Black River, and there was even the existence of the Origin Origin Middle Realm to seize the Origin Black Mud.

Even though the Origin Black River is very large, the speed of the Origin Realm is also very fast, and the efficiency of collecting the Origin Black Mud is naturally very high.

In the back, if you want to find more Origin Black Mud, you can only kill people and sell more.

And Ye Tian had already transferred all the harvest to the other copy bodies, even if the copy bodies in the Origin Black River fell, they would not leave anything for the enemy.

Before you know it, the tidal period is almost over.

this day.

The power of the tides receded, the Origin Black River was no longer dangerous, and Wind Tooth Island was lifted and gradually returned to normal.

......

Far away from Fengya Island, on the Origin Black River.

Ye Tian came here from Wind Tooth Island, saw his other copy body, and got all the origin black mud from this copy body, and then returned to Wind Tooth Island.

Eternal Origin Circle.

Ye Tian took out some Origin Black Clay, smeared it on his body, and then began to cultivate while comprehending the Origin Rules on the other side.

With the help of the Origin Black Mud, his physical body was tempered by a wonderful energy, and the strength of his physical body slowly increased, and his Origin Will was also improving.

What's more, he comprehended the Origin Rules of the other side, and the effect was much faster.

"It's a good thing!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

With the Origin Black Mud, his Origin Rule Realm on the other side has improved faster, and the speed of his strength improvement is also getting faster and faster.

Compared to a force, the Origin Black Mud he obtained was not much, but it was enough for him personally.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

More than 20,000 years have passed.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian felt that he had already stepped into the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm, he didn't test it, and he also knew that his Origin on the other side had reached the level of 3,000, which was all the improvement of the Origin Rules on the other side, which caused his Origin to skyrocket, and only then did he break through the realm.

After becoming the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm, his strength has indeed improved, coupled with the fact that his physical body and Origin Will have been tempered and improved by the Origin Black Mud, as well as the improvement of the Origin Rules on the other side, his overall strength is naturally far surpassed.

Other than that.

During this time, he created a good supreme technique on the other side.

This supreme technique on the other side is based on speed, and the two supreme techniques he created before, one is to attack, the other is to defend, and there is also a lack of speed-like supreme art.

Therefore, he created the third supreme technique of the other side.

He named this supreme art of the other side as the Trick Light, which not only possesses terrifying speed, but also has the effect of distorting time and space and confusing the perception of enemies.

In battle, the Trick Light will also be of great help.

this day.

A major incident happened on Wind Tooth Island, which caused a shock in the entire Wind Tooth Island, even the Eternal Origin Formation that Ye Tian had cultivated in retreat was trembling, and even the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity was affected.

He immediately came out of the Eternal Origin Circle, only to see an astonishing scene.

In the center of Wind Tooth Island, a huge white fox phantom was aimed at the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, opening its bloody mouth and constantly swallowing the power of the origin.

Around the white fox phantom, time and space were constantly superimposed, and billions of time and space were distorted.

And in the depths of this endless time and space, a figure was sitting there cross-legged, absorbing endless energy.

Ye Tian couldn't see the person's appearance clearly, but he also knew where this location was.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon.

One of the island masters of Wind Tooth Island and the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors all came.

Seeing this scene, the Lord of the White Capital muttered, "The Lord of Ice and Rain has finally taken this step!"

"Yes, the Lord of Ice and Rain has been staying in the Origin Middle Realm for countless years, and it is said that this time, she killed ten Origin Black Whales from the Origin Black River, and even escaped from the hands of a Origin Upper Realm. This time, she was able to break through, and it is estimated that she also had the help of the Origin Middle Realm Origin Black Whale Whale Oil, otherwise it would not be so easy to break through. Another owner said.

"The Lord of Ice and Rain will soon become the existence of the Origin Upper Realm, and will become the fourth Origin Upper Realm of our Wind Tooth Island, and I don't know when we will be able to break through!"

"It all takes luck, it's not good!"

"If you give me a large amount of Origin Middle Realm Origin Black Whale Whale Oil, I will also be able to break through!"

"Even if you are given a large amount of Origin Black Whale Whale Oil, your hope of breaking through is less than one percent. "~
